source.sourcePath: raw/sources/Project/02_CYAN/1. DHF/23. 성능 검증 데이터/3. [GT series] 성능시험성적서 (A-PTR-CYN)_251118.docx

document.title: 성능 시험 성적서 / Performance Test Report

sourceSummary.oneLine: Performance test report confirming GT series detector performance for the HnX-R1 medical imaging acquisition device.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Documents performance verification results for GT series detectors of the HnX-R1, including test criteria, methods, measured results, and pass/fail outcomes.
keyPoints: Test products are GT1717C and GT1717CP under model HnX-R1.
All listed performance test items are reported as PASS.
The conclusion states that no abnormality was confirmed in the performance setting values of the HnX-R1 GT series medical imaging acquisition device.
Attachments listed include Panel, CsI, ROIC, CPU module specifications, and KGMP certificate.

concepts.name: Performance Test Report
concepts.evidence: 성능 시험 성적서 Performance Test Report

concepts.name: Medical imaging acquisition device
concepts.evidence: Product name 의료영상획득장치 Digital Falt Panel X-ray Detector

concepts.name: GT series detector performance verification
concepts.evidence: 본 시험 성적서는 의료영상획득장치 (HnX-R1)의 GT series 디텍터 성능 확인을 위한 시험성적서이다.

concepts.name: MTF
concepts.evidence: MTF Phantom 영상 이미지를 획득하여 Calibration 적용 후 ‘Final Test’ 프로그램을 사용한 측정값이 시험 기준을 만족하는지 확인한다.

concepts.name: DQE
concepts.evidence: Bright 영상 이미지를 획득하여 Calibration 적용 후 ‘Final Test’ 프로그램을 사용한 측정값이 시험 기준을 만족하는지 확인한다.

evidence.claim: The document is a performance test report for GT series detector performance verification of the HnX-R1 medical imaging acquisition device.
evidence.evidenceText: 본 시험 성적서는 의료영상획득장치 (HnX-R1)의 GT series 디텍터 성능 확인을 위한 시험성적서이다.

evidence.claim: The manufacturer is H&abyz Co., Ltd.
evidence.evidenceText: Manufacturer H&abyz Co., Ltd.

evidence.claim: The model name is HnX-R1.
evidence.evidenceText: Model Name HnX-R1

evidence.claim: The GT series test product reference numbers are GT1717C and GT1717CP.
evidence.evidenceText: GTseries Ref no GT1717C GT1717CP

evidence.claim: The console software is HnVUE.
evidence.evidenceText: Console software HnVUE

evidence.claim: Revision number 0 was issued on 2025.11.17 as the first establishment.
evidence.evidenceText: Rev. No. 0 Issue date 2025.11.17 Note First establishment

evidence.claim: The test period was 2025.11.14 to 2025.11.17.
The test place was H&abyz in Yongin-si, Gyeonggi-do, Korea.
evidence.evidenceText: 시험장소: ㈜에이치앤아비즈 (경기도 용인시 처인구 처인성로41-16 2동 (우) 17118)

evidence.claim: Sensor type criterion was a-Si TFT and the result was PASS.
evidence.evidenceText: Sensor Type a-Si TFT 사양서 확인 PASS

evidence.claim: Scintillator criterion was CsI and the result was PASS.
evidence.evidenceText: Scintillator 확인 CsI 사양서 확인 PASS

evidence.claim: Pixel pitch criterion was 140μm and the result was PASS.
evidence.evidenceText: Pixel pitch 140μm 사양서 확인 PASS

evidence.claim: Effective pixel number criterion was 3072 x 3072 pixels and the result was PASS.
evidence.evidenceText: Effective Pixel Number 확인 3072 x 3072 pixels 전체영상 획득 후 유효한 영역의 픽셀 수 확인 PASS

evidence.claim: Effective pixel area criterion was 430.08 x 430.08 mm and the result was PASS.
evidence.evidenceText: Effective Pixel Area 확인 430.08 x 430.08mm 전체 영상획득 후 유효한 Pixel 확인 후 Pitch Area계산 (Pixel Pitch * 유효 Pixel) PASS

evidence.claim: MTF measured values were 96%, 80%, 61%, 42%, and 21% at 0.1, 0.5, 1.0, 2.0, and 3.0 lp/mm, respectively, with PASS result.
evidence.evidenceText: 0.1lp/mm 93% 이상 96% PASS 0.5lp/mm 75%이상 80% 1.0lp/mm 55%이상 61% 2.0lp/mm 35%이상 42% 3.0lp/mm 15%이상 21%

evidence.claim: DQE measured values were 53%, 42%, 32%, 26%, and 22% at 0.1, 0.5, 1.0, 2.0, and 3.0 lp/mm, respectively, with PASS result.
evidence.evidenceText: 0.1lp/mm 45%이상 53% PASS 0.5lp/mm 35%이상 42% 1.0lp/mm 25%이상 32% 2.0lp/mm 20%이상 26% 3.0lp/mm 15%이상 22%

evidence.claim: Sensitivity criterion was at least 110 LSB/uGy at center, measured value was 136 LSB/uGy, and result was PASS.
evidence.evidenceText: Center 기준 110 LSB/uGy 이상 136 LSB/uGy PASS

evidence.claim: Limited resolution criterion was Max 3.57 lp/mm and the calculated measured value was 3.57 lp/mm with PASS result.
evidence.evidenceText: Max 3.57 lp/mm 1 / 140um * 2 = 3.57 lp/mm PASS

evidence.claim: Energy range testing confirmed normal operation at 40 kVp and 150 kVp with PASS result.
evidence.evidenceText: 40kvp 조사 시 정상동작 정상 동작 확인 PASS 150kvp 조사 시 정상동작 정상 동작 확인

evidence.claim: A/D conversion criterion was 16 bits and the result was PASS.
evidence.evidenceText: A/D Conversion 16bits 사양서 확인 PASS

evidence.claim: Communication criterion was at least 1 Giga-bit Ethernet via PoE and the result was PASS.
evidence.evidenceText: Communication 1 Giga-bit Ethernet via PoE (Power over Ethernet)이상 CPU모듈 사양서 확인 PASS

evidence.claim: Trigger mode testing covered AED and Line Manual Trigger, both with image acquisition confirmed and PASS result.
evidence.evidenceText: AED(Automatic Exposure Detection) 영상취득 확인 PASS Line(Manual) Trigger 영상취득 확인

evidence.claim: The conclusion states that no abnormality was confirmed in the performance setting values of the HnX-R1 GT series medical imaging acquisition device.
evidence.evidenceText: 해당 시험 결과를 통해 의료영상획득장치 (모델명: HnX-R1, GT series)의 성능 설정 값에 이상 없음을 확인하였다.

reviewFlags.reason: No external regulatory authority or jurisdiction is explicitly identified; authoritySignal is general.
The source lists KGMP certificate as an attachment, but certificate details such as authority, certificate number, and date are not present.
GT1717CP is listed as a test product reference number, but no serial number is shown in the extracted text.
Product name text contains apparent typo or OCR issue: 'Digital Falt Panel X-ray Detector'.
